milestones.title: Integration architecture
milestones.description: Initializer harness, campaign docs, and architecture plan. No production code changes.

milestones.title: GUI application-service foundation
milestones.description: Typed command/result/progress envelope, shared background-worker plumbing, and the mechanical archivefs-gui/src/main.rs module split.

milestones.title: Library integration
milestones.description: Extend the existing Library screen to match design intent: listing, search, filters, selection, inspection, manual platform assignment, missing records, duplicates, refresh.

milestones.title: Sources integration
milestones.description: Extend the existing Sources screen: listing, availability, add, enable/disable, scan one, scan all, remove (retain vs delete records).

milestones.title: Doctor integration
milestones.description: Promote Doctor from a ToolsOverlay to a full design-matching screen with structured checks, severity, technical details, suggested actions.

milestones.title: History and Logs integration
milestones.description: Give the in-memory OperationHistory a persisted backing store and build the History & Logs screen: inspection, filtering, export.

milestones.title: Mount preview
milestones.description: New Mount screen: destination preview, validation, collision handling, queueing, before any mount is executed.

milestones.title: Mount execution
milestones.description: Single-archive mount execution wired to the new Mount screen via the application-service foundation.

milestones.title: Batch mount outcomes
milestones.description: Batch/mount-all execution with per-item outcomes, partial success reporting, and progress.

milestones.title: Active Mounts integration
milestones.description: New Active Mounts screen: refresh, normal unmount, lazy unmount, cleanup, remount offer, stale-mount recovery.

milestones.title: Normal unmount
milestones.description: Single and batch normal unmount wired into Active Mounts via the application-service foundation.

milestones.title: Lazy unmount
milestones.description: Lazy unmount workflow, including its existing progress-channel precedent, wired into Active Mounts.

milestones.title: Stale mount recovery
milestones.description: Cleanup and stale-mount recovery workflows surfaced in Active Mounts and Doctor.

milestones.title: Progress and activity
milestones.description: Shared ProgressEvent model and an Activity feed generalized from the existing OperationHistory panel.

milestones.title: Structured errors
milestones.description: Shared DisplayError model generalized from the existing ActionFeedback.more_information pattern.

milestones.title: Notifications
milestones.description: Toast/banner notification surface for background-operation completion, built on the progress/error models.

milestones.title: Trusted RetroArch source workflow
milestones.description: GUI workflow for the fixed trusted cheat-source list: view, fetch (backgrounded), inspect, offline reuse.

milestones.title: Catalogue provenance
milestones.description: Surface cheat-catalogue and cheat-source provenance/freshness/schema-version metadata in the GUI.

milestones.title: RetroArch profile selection
milestones.description: GUI workflow for discovering and selecting a RetroArch profile for cheat setup.

milestones.title: Cheat preview
milestones.description: GUI workflow for matching a selected archive against the cheat catalogue and previewing the install plan.

milestones.title: Cheat installation
milestones.description: GUI workflow for executing a cheat install run, including replacement backups.

milestones.title: Installation history
milestones.description: GUI workflow for inspecting cheat install/rollback journals and history.

milestones.title: Rollback
milestones.description: GUI workflow for executing a cheat rollback run from history.

milestones.title: Settings integration
milestones.description: New Settings screen limited to backend-supported configuration; prototype-only settings explicitly deferred.

milestones.title: About and support information
milestones.description: New About screen: version/build/licence/environment info from existing ConfigIdentity-style data; support-bundle export scoped down or deferred.

milestones.title: Final hardening
milestones.description: Cross-screen consistency pass, error-path review, and isolated acceptance testing.

milestones.title: Release readiness
milestones.description: Final validation, changelog/docs update, and release-checklist review.

features.title: Campaign initializer harness
features.description: Create campaign plan, progress ledger, feature ledger, capability matrix, and preflight script; verify preconditions.
safety_constraints: No production Rust source changed
design-reference/ left untouched and unstaged
No other worktree touched
acceptance_steps: Preconditions verified via git status/branch/HEAD/origin comparison
Five campaign files created
fable-preflight.sh passes
FABLE_FEATURES.json validates as JSON
Single commit made, not pushed
features.evidence: This initializer commit itself; see docs/FABLE_PROGRESS.md 'Files and modules inspected'.

features.title: Split archivefs-gui/src/main.rs into modules
features.description: Mechanically extract the existing 25.4k-line main.rs into per-feature modules (library, sources, doctor, mount, history, retroarch, settings, about) with no behavioral change.
features.existing_backend_capability: n/a — refactor of existing GUI code only
safety_constraints: No behavioral change; pure code motion
cargo build -p archivefs-gui succeeds before and after with identical warnings
acceptance_steps: cargo build -p archivefs-gui succeeds
All existing archivefs-gui tests still pass unchanged
git diff shows only moved code, no logic edits
required_tests: existing archivefs-gui test suite (~347 #[test] fns) unchanged

features.title: Typed Command/CommandOutcome envelope
features.description: Define a shared Command enum and CommandOutcome enum to replace the ~14 hand-rolled per-feature request/result type pairs identified in FABLE_CAMPAIGN_PLAN.md section 5.
features.existing_backend_capability: archivefs-core free functions already return typed Result<T, E> values suitable as CommandOutcome payloads
safety_constraints: Additive only — existing workflows are not required to migrate in this feature
acceptance_steps: New Command/CommandOutcome types compile and are unit-testable independent of eframe
At least one new (not previously existing) workflow uses them end to end
required_tests: unit tests for Command -> CommandOutcome mapping

features.title: Shared spawn-and-poll worker plumbing
features.description: Provide one reusable function/struct that spawns a thread for a Command and exposes an mpsc::Receiver<CommandOutcome>, replacing per-call-site mpsc::channel()+thread::spawn boilerplate for new workflows.
features.existing_backend_capability: std::thread + std::sync::mpsc pattern already proven at ~14 call sites in main.rs
safety_constraints: No async runtime introduced
No new dependency added
acceptance_steps: New workflows built in Milestones 2-4 use this plumbing instead of hand-rolled channels

features.title: ProgressEvent model
features.description: Define a closed ProgressEvent enum (started/substep/cleanup/finished) generalizing the existing single-purpose OperationProgress::CleanupStarted variant.
features.existing_backend_capability: Existing precedent: OperationProgress enum and mpsc::Sender<OperationProgress> argument in the mount/unmount worker closure (main.rs:4020)
safety_constraints: Send-safe across thread::mpsc boundary
Workflows without meaningful progress may skip intermediate events
acceptance_steps: ProgressEvent is exercised by at least the Mount and RetroArch install workflows

features.title: Library listing and search parity check
features.description: Verify existing Library MainView listing/search against the design's Library screen; extend query/highlight behavior only where a gap is found.
features.existing_backend_capability: ArchiveRecord, ArchiveRow, current_archive_records, library-list/library-find CLI precedent
safety_constraints: Read-only; must not alter source archives
acceptance_steps: Manual comparison against design-reference Library screen
Existing Library tests still pass

features.title: Library filters parity (platform, health, presence)
features.description: Confirm LibraryRowFilters covers the design's filter chips (All Platforms, All Health, All Presence, etc.); add missing filter dimensions only if the design requires one not already present.
acceptance_steps: Each design filter chip maps to an existing or newly-added LibraryRowFilters field

features.title: Manual platform assignment integration
features.description: Confirm single and bulk manual platform assignment (PlatformAction, BulkPlatformActionKind) match the design's 'Detected Platform / Override' interaction.
safety_constraints: Manual assignment must not silently overwrite automatic detection provenance without the existing confirmation flow
acceptance_steps: Existing platform-assignment tests pass; new design-parity check documented

features.title: Missing records and duplicates parity
features.description: Confirm 'Remove Missing Records' and the Duplicates dashboard match the design's ARCHIVES / MISSING and DUPLICATE GROUP interactions.
safety_constraints: Deletion of catalogue records must never delete underlying archive files
acceptance_steps: Existing duplicate-review tests pass

features.title: Library refresh wired to application-service
features.description: Migrate the Library refresh/scan-triggered reload path onto the GUI-ARCH-002/003 command envelope.
acceptance_steps: Refresh still produces identical DatabaseState transitions after migration

features.title: Sources listing and availability parity
features.description: Confirm SourceFolderView-backed Sources screen matches the design's listing/availability/Last Scanned display.
acceptance_steps: Manual comparison against design Sources screen

features.title: Add / enable / disable source parity
features.description: Confirm add-source (native folder picker via rfd), enable/disable toggling match design's 'Add Source' and 'Enabled' interactions.
safety_constraints: validate_new_source_folder's existing path-safety checks must remain the only gate; no new path validation invented in the GUI layer
acceptance_steps: Existing source-add/toggle tests pass

features.title: Scan one / scan all parity
features.description: Confirm 'Scan Now' (single source) and a design-required 'scan all' affordance both map to scan_source_folder_at / scan_all_enabled_sources_at.
acceptance_steps: Scan-all triggers one ScanPersistSummary per enabled source, matching CLI 'sources' behavior

features.title: Remove source: retain vs delete records
features.description: Confirm the design's 'Remove Source (Keep Records)' vs 'Remove Source and Records' map exactly to RemoveSourceFolderOutcome's two modes.
safety_constraints: Never delete underlying archive files, only catalogue records and/or the source-folder registration
acceptance_steps: Existing remove-source tests pass; both modes covered

features.title: Reconcile DoctorReport vs ConfigCheckReport/SetupDiagnostics
features.description: Decide and implement whether the new Doctor screen surfaces a merged report or both report types clearly separated; document the decision.
safety_constraints: Read-only; Doctor checks must not mutate config or database as a side effect of running
acceptance_steps: Decision documented in FABLE_PROGRESS.md before UI work begins

features.title: Promote Doctor to a full MainView screen
features.description: Move Doctor from ToolsOverlay::DoctorChecks to a first-class screen matching the design's severity/technical-details/suggested-action layout.
acceptance_steps: 'Run All Checks (F5)' and 'Retry Where Safe' interactions map to existing run_doctor* entry points
required_tests: existing DoctorChecks overlay tests adapted, not deleted
features.evidence: Redesigned shell adds MainView::Doctor rendering show_doctor_checks_panel as a primary destination; ToolsOverlay::DoctorChecks retained. Full design parity (severity layout, suggested actions) still open.

features.title: Database and mount diagnostics coverage
features.description: Confirm DatabaseHealthReport and mount-related Doctor checks are represented as distinct, filterable check categories in the new screen.
acceptance_steps: Each DoctorCheck / DatabaseDiagnostic surfaces its severity and suggested action verbatim

features.title: RetroArch diagnostics coverage
features.description: Confirm RetroArch profile/environment diagnostics (retroarch-environment CLI precedent) are exposed as Doctor checks, not only as a separate RetroArch screen concern.
acceptance_steps: At least one RetroArch-environment check appears in the Doctor screen's check list

features.title: Decide operation-history persistence approach
features.description: Resolve the open question in FABLE_PROGRESS.md: persist OperationHistory to a GUI-local JSON log file (default lean) vs. a new archivefs-core module.
safety_constraints: Log file writes must be additive/append-only and never block the UI thread synchronously for large logs
acceptance_steps: Decision documented before HISTORY-002 begins

features.title: History & Logs screen
features.description: Build the new screen: RECENT OPERATIONS list, filtering by operation/date/result, 'Clear Logs', 'Export Log'/'Export Current Logs'.
safety_constraints: 'Clear Logs' must only clear the persisted log, never any underlying operation records (mount state, catalogue, journals)
acceptance_steps: Existing OperationHistory tests extended, not duplicated
features.evidence: Redesigned shell adds MainView::HistoryLogs full-screen page over the in-memory OperationHistory (listing, per-entry copy, clear). Filtering/export/persistence still open.

features.title: RetroArch journal history surfaced in History & Logs
features.description: Cross-link cheat_history::discover_cheat_history entries into the general History & Logs view (or clearly document why they remain a separate RetroArch-only history).
acceptance_steps: Decision (merged vs separate) documented

features.title: Mount screen: destination preview
features.description: New Mount screen showing MOUNT DESTINATION / PLANNED DESTINATION and MOUNT COMMAND preview before execution, per design's 'Mount' screen.
safety_constraints: Preview must never itself perform a mount
acceptance_steps: Mount screen shows a MountPlan-derived preview matching the design's MOUNT COMMAND panel
features.evidence: Redesigned Mount page (show_mount_page) lists live archives with planned destination (record.mount_plan.mount_path) and per-archive validation label; rendering never mounts. Design inspector panel (size/source library detail) still open. Selected page (show_selected_page) adds queue review: per-entry planned destination and planned_action_label (Mount / skip reasons), per-row Remove, shared confirmation strip (show_mount_queue_confirmation). Mount-command preview deliberately deferred (configured ratarmount binary not in GUI state).

features.title: Mount queue (Add to Mount Queue / Add to Queue)
features.description: Implement the design's queueing interaction (select multiple archives, review before committing to Mount Selected).
features.existing_backend_capability: MountAllItem, existing 'Mount Selected (Ctrl+M)' batch selection precedent
acceptance_steps: Queue add/remove does not trigger any mount call until explicit confirmation
features.evidence: Mount page queue: per-row Queue/Unqueue, Queue all visible, Clear queue, QUEUED badge, queue order preserved, dedup on insert, pruned against live snapshot (prune_mount_queue), inline confirmation before execution. Unit tests: queued_pending_paths_keeps_queue_order_and_only_pending_archives, prune_mount_queue_drops_only_archives_missing_from_the_snapshot.

features.title: Destination collision handling in preview
features.description: Surface MountBatchTargetValidation/MountBatchTargetSkipReason in the preview UI before mount execution, matching design collision-handling intent.
acceptance_steps: Every MountBatchTargetSkipReason variant has a corresponding preview message
features.evidence: MountState::MountPathExists surfaced in preview as "Destination already exists — will be skipped" (mount_validation_labels test); execution-side skip reporting was already in MountAllResult. Full MountBatchTargetValidation surfacing still open.

features.title: Single mount execution via application-service
features.description: Wire 'Mount Selected' single-item execution through the GUI-ARCH command envelope, replacing the ad-hoc per-call-site channel where practical.
safety_constraints: Never mount without going through MountBackend; never bypass existing collision/validation checks
acceptance_steps: Existing single-mount tests pass after migration

features.title: Mount-with-read-only toggle parity
features.description: Confirm the design's 'Mount read-only' checkbox maps to an existing or newly-needed MountPlan/backend option; document if unsupported.
acceptance_steps: Either confirmed supported end-to-end, or documented as intentionally unsupported in GUI_BACKEND_CAPABILITY_MATRIX.md

features.title: Batch mount execution with per-item outcomes
features.description: Wire MountAllResult/MountAllFailure/MountAllSkipped reporting into the new Mount screen with partial-success presentation matching design intent.
acceptance_steps: Existing batch-mount tests pass after any migration to the new command envelope
features.evidence: Mount page queue execution reuses the proven start_mount_all batch engine (per-item outcomes/skips in MountAllResult, rendered on the Mount page). Application-service envelope deferred per 2026-07-22 direction change.

features.title: Batch mount progress reporting
features.description: Extend MountAllProgress to use the shared ProgressEvent model (GUI-ARCH-004) instead of its bespoke progress type.
acceptance_steps: Progress bar during batch mount still updates per-item

features.title: Active Mounts screen: listing and refresh
features.description: New Active Mounts screen listing currently-mounted archives (filtered from current_archive_records / current_statuses) with a Refresh action.
features.existing_backend_capability: current_statuses, ArchiveStatus, MountState::Mounted filter (existing precedent at multiple main.rs call sites)
safety_constraints: No direct 'list active mounts' core API exists yet — reuse the existing filter-over-all-records pattern rather than inventing a new core query prematurely
acceptance_steps: Screen lists exactly the archives with MountState::Mounted
features.evidence: Redesigned shell adds MainView::ActiveMounts read-only listing via pending_unmount_items over the live snapshot. Refresh/unmount/cleanup actions on the page still open.

features.title: Remount offer
features.description: Implement the design's 'Remount' action using remount_one_archive_path.
acceptance_steps: Remount only offered for archives whose mount state indicates a valid remount target

features.title: Single normal unmount via application-service
features.description: Wire the design's Active Mounts 'Unmount' action through unmount_one_archive_with_backend and the new command envelope.
acceptance_steps: Existing single-unmount tests pass after migration

features.title: Batch normal unmount
features.description: Wire UnmountAllResult/UnmountAllFailure reporting into Active Mounts with partial-success presentation.
acceptance_steps: Existing batch-unmount tests pass

features.title: Lazy unmount workflow in Active Mounts
features.description: Wire the design's 'Lazy Unmount' action through lazy_unmount_one_archive_path_with_progress, preserving its existing progress-channel behavior.
safety_constraints: Lazy unmount's existing progress-sender pattern (main.rs:4020) is the precedent for GUI-ARCH-004's ProgressEvent — generalize, do not discard
acceptance_steps: Existing lazy-unmount tests pass

features.title: Cleanup and stale-mount recovery in Active Mounts
features.description: Surface cleanup_selected_mount_dir/cleanup_selected_mount_tree/clean_mount_root as the design's 'Cleanup'/'Retry Where Safe' actions.
safety_constraints: Cleanup must only ever remove empty/stale mount-point directories, never archive or catalogue data
acceptance_steps: Existing cleanup tests pass

features.title: Unified Activity feed
features.description: Generalize the existing Activity panel (show_activity_panel) to consume the shared ProgressEvent/OperationHistory across all screens, not just mount/unmount.
acceptance_steps: Every new workflow (Mount, RetroArch, Sources) reports into the same Activity feed

features.title: Shared DisplayError model
features.description: Generalize ActionFeedback.more_information into a reusable DisplayError { message, more_information } used by every new workflow's failure path.
features.existing_backend_capability: ActionFeedback (existing precedent, main.rs:4867), ArchiveFsError and domain error enums (PatchManagerError, CheatSourceError, DestinationSafetyError)
safety_constraints: Underlying core Result/error types remain the source of truth; DisplayError is a presentation-only mapping
acceptance_steps: Every new workflow's failure path renders via DisplayError

features.title: Background-operation completion notifications
features.description: Add a toast/banner surface for background command completion (success/failure), built on ProgressEvent/DisplayError.
features.existing_backend_capability: n/a — new GUI-only presentation layer over existing result types
acceptance_steps: Notifications appear for at least Mount, Unmount, and RetroArch install completion

features.title: Trusted source list screen
features.description: GUI listing of trusted_retroarch_cheat_sources() — the fixed, code-defined list only; no free-text URL entry.
safety_constraints: Must not introduce a second trust boundary (no user-supplied URL field)
acceptance_steps: GUI list matches trusted_retroarch_cheat_sources() output exactly

features.title: Backgrounded fetch
features.description: Wire fetch_retroarch_cheat_source through a background thread (GUI-ARCH-003) since it performs blocking ureq HTTP I/O — must never run on the UI thread.
safety_constraints: Blocking network call must run off the UI thread; enforce via code review, not just testing
acceptance_steps: Fetch does not freeze the UI during a live network call (manual test)

features.title: Inspect and offline reuse
features.description: GUI action for inspect_retroarch_cheat_source[_snapshot] allowing offline reuse of a previously-fetched source without re-fetching.
acceptance_steps: Offline inspect works with no network access (manual test)

features.title: Catalogue and source provenance display
features.description: Surface CheatCatalogueSnapshot / CheatSourceCacheMetadata provenance, schema version, and freshness fields in the GUI wherever catalogue data is shown.
safety_constraints: Never alter or strip provenance metadata; display verbatim
acceptance_steps: Provenance fields visible next to any cheat catalogue data in the GUI

features.title: Profile discovery screen
features.description: GUI listing of discover_retroarch_cheat_setup_profiles() results ('Discovered Profiles', 'Rescan Profiles').
acceptance_steps: Rescan re-runs discovery and updates the list without restarting the app

features.title: Profile selection with blocker surfacing
features.description: GUI selection of a profile via resolve_retroarch_cheat_setup_profile, surfacing RetroArchCheatSetupProfileBlocker reasons when a profile cannot be used.
acceptance_steps: Every RetroArchCheatSetupProfileBlocker variant has a corresponding user-facing message

features.title: Cheat match and availability preview
features.description: GUI workflow matching a selected archive against the cheat catalogue (match_cheat_game_record) and showing build_cheat_availability_report / confidence.
safety_constraints: Preview must not write any files
acceptance_steps: Confidence levels shown match CheatMatchConfidence exactly

features.title: Install plan preview
features.description: GUI display of build_retroarch_cheat_setup_plan()'s RetroArchCheatSetupPlan / RetroArchCheatSetupPreviewSummary before install, matching design's PLANNED ACTION / PLANNED DESTINATION labels.
safety_constraints: Preview must not execute any install action
acceptance_steps: Preview PLANNED ACTION list matches plan.planned_entries exactly

features.title: Cheat install execution
features.description: GUI action executing execute_cheat_install_run via the application-service command envelope, backgrounded like all other write operations.
safety_constraints: Must go through destination_safety::assess_destination / construct_safe_destination exactly as the CLI does — no GUI-side shortcut
acceptance_steps: Existing cheat_installer tests pass; GUI install produces an identical CheatInstallRun to the CLI for the same inputs

features.title: Replacement backup confirmation
features.description: Surface CHEAT_INSTALL_BACKUPS_DIRECTORY_NAME backup creation in the GUI's install confirmation/result screen.
acceptance_steps: Backup path shown to the user when a replacement occurs

features.title: Cheat install/rollback history screen
features.description: GUI listing of discover_cheat_history() entries, matching the design's history/journal inspection intent for RetroArch operations.
safety_constraints: Read-only inspection; must not modify journal files
acceptance_steps: Existing cheat_history tests pass

features.title: Journal inspection detail view
features.description: GUI detail view for inspect_cheat_install_journal(), surfacing CheatJournalInspection / CheatDestinationAssessment / CheatBackupAssessment.
acceptance_steps: Every CheatJournalInspectionError variant maps to a user-facing message

features.title: Cheat rollback execution
features.description: GUI action executing execute_cheat_rollback_run from a selected history entry, gated by CheatRollbackAvailability.
safety_constraints: Rollback must only be offered when CheatRollbackAvailability indicates it is safe
acceptance_steps: Existing cheat_rollback tests pass

features.title: Post-rollback guidance
features.description: Display CheatRollbackSummary / CheatRollbackRunStatus outcome with the design's post-install/post-rollback guidance messaging.
acceptance_steps: Every CheatRollbackRunStatus variant has distinct, correct guidance text

features.title: Backend-supported settings screen
features.description: New Settings screen limited to what archivefs-core actually persists: source folder configs, mount root, config path (Config, default_config_path).
safety_constraints: Must not fabricate settings with no backing store
acceptance_steps: Every control in the Settings screen maps to a real, persisted Config field
features.evidence: Redesigned shell adds MainView::Settings read-only page (config path, database path). Editable settings still open.

features.title: Prototype-only settings deferred
features.description: Explicitly mark design-only settings (e.g. 'Comfortable/Compact' density, 'Reset All Settings') as deferred/unsupported in GUI_BACKEND_CAPABILITY_MATRIX.md rather than fabricating backend state for them.
acceptance_steps: GUI_BACKEND_CAPABILITY_MATRIX.md lists each deferred setting under 'intentionally unsupported'

features.title: About screen: build and environment info
features.description: New About screen showing version/build/licence/OS/desktop-environment info from existing ConfigIdentity-style data and Cargo package metadata.
acceptance_steps: Version shown matches workspace.package.version exactly
features.evidence: Redesigned shell adds MainView::About page sharing show_about_contents with the existing About window (version, database path, config path). Environment info still open.

features.title: Support bundle export scoped down
features.description: Document that 'Export Support Bundle'/'Check for Updates' have no backend today (per FABLE_CAMPAIGN_PLAN.md section 16); scope a minimal version (e.g. copy Doctor report + config summary) or defer entirely.
features.existing_backend_capability: n/a — no existing backend for update-check or bundling
safety_constraints: Must not perform any network call for 'Check for Updates' unless a future milestone explicitly adds one
acceptance_steps: Decision (minimal implementation vs. deferred) documented before ABOUT-001 UI ships a button for it

features.title: Cross-screen consistency pass
features.description: Review all new screens for consistent error presentation (ERRORS-001), consistent progress presentation (PROGRESS-001), and consistent navigation with MainView/ToolsOverlay conventions.
acceptance_steps: No screen bypasses the shared DisplayError/ProgressEvent/Command models introduced in Milestone 1

features.title: Isolated acceptance testing
features.description: Run full workspace validation (fmt, clippy, test) and manual acceptance against design-reference for every screen.
acceptance_steps: cargo fmt --all -- --check
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo test --workspace all pass

features.title: Release checklist review
features.description: Update docs/release-checklist.md and docs/roadmap.md to reflect the completed Fable integration; confirm no campaign-only artifacts (fable-preflight.sh assumptions) leak into release requirements.
acceptance_steps: Release checklist accurately reflects shipped GUI screens

features.title: Performance review
features.description: Confirm no new screen introduces a UI-thread-blocking call (especially RetroArch fetch and mount/unmount), per the concurrency risks in FABLE_CAMPAIGN_PLAN.md section 20.
safety_constraints: No synchronous I/O call reachable from the UI thread
acceptance_steps: Manual review of every thread::spawn/direct-call site added during the campaign
